title: Dangote alleges sleaze at NMDPRA, demands Investigation, prosecution of Farouk Ahmed … Says petrol pump price to fall below N740 per litre before Christmas - FinancialEDGE
description: President and Chief Executive of Dangote Industries Limited, Aliko Dangote, has called for an investigation and prosecution of the Chief Executive Officer of the Nigerian Midstream and Downstream Petroleum Regulatory Authority (NMDPRA), Engr Farouk Ahmed, accusing him of economic sabotage, which he said is undermining domestic refining in Nigeria. Speaking at a press conference at
html: President and Chief Executive of Dangote Industries Limited, Aliko Dangote, has called for an investigation and prosecution of the Chief Executive Officer of the Nigerian Midstream and Downstream Petroleum Regulatory Authority (NMDPRA), Engr Farouk Ahmed, accusing him of economic sabotage, which he said is undermining domestic refining in Nigeria.
